records.statement: The --secrets-file flag auto-detects and accepts both a flat JSON object and a .env-format KEY=VALUE file; the reference CLI models only JSON and rejects the .env form.
records.notes: Intentional Deacon extension (a strict superset). Recorded by ext-secrets-file-env-format; backed by case-secrets-dotenv. See docs/DIFFERENTIATORS.md and crates/core/src/secrets.rs.
